calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-27-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Julio J. Ramos, Esq. for appellant Jose Marenco who is present
Ramon Quinteros, Respondent
David Ortiz, witness for respondent Ramon Quinteros
Court Certified Spanish interpreter Daniel Navarro #300802 interprets for both parties

All parties and witnesses are sworn
This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo.

Julio Ramos testifies on behalf of appellant Jose Marenco.

Appellant exhibits are marked for identification
1) Agreement
2) Print out State Contractor's License Status
3) Print out Marenco's Plumbing #10108591
4) Comparable listings for 2002 Buick Century Sedan

Julio Ramos examines his client Jose Marenco

Ramon Quiteros testifes on his own behalf
Respondents exhibits marked for identification
A) Three pages copy of Bond Request
B) Copy of Contractors card
David Ortiz testifies on behalf of the Ramon Quinteros

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (502)
